text: I feel strangely both exposed and curious in this space. The glass walls create a sense of transparency, yet the clean sterility and artificial light remind me of the boundaries between observation and genuine experience. Entering the R+D room, the vibrant installations and philosophical text on the screens provoke reflection. I am drawn to wonder about the interaction between human presence and technology, and how observation shapes reality. There is a subtle unease under the surface—am I here to witness, to be witnessed, or simply to exist in the space between those roles?
